title: Cis-mediated interactions of the SARS-CoV-2 frameshift RNA alter its conformations and affect the function
author: Pekarek, Lukas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Supplementary data accompanying "Cis-mediated interactions of the SARS-CoV-2 frameshift RNA alter its conformations and affect the function " manuscript. 
This dataset contains: 

 
	 Raw gel pictures 
	 list of oligonucleotides and plasmids used in the study 
	 FD curves used in the study 
	 DMS-MaP-Seq data 
	 raw values of flow cytometry 
	 raw values of gel quantification
